zh.Lillesdon Manor, Taunton, Somerset, Engl: 英國英格蘭薩默塞特利勒達

zh.lifeSummary: 當Isolt De Beauchamp於大約1356年出生在英國薩默塞特陶頓時，她的父親John De Beauchamp33歲，母親Joan Bridport23歲。她於1372年與John de Milbourne II在英國英格蘭薩默塞特利勒達結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1381年在英國賀福爾提林頓享年26歲。

zh-hans.Taunton, Somerset, England: 英国英格兰薩默塞特陶頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isolt De Beauchamp于大约1356年出生在英国薩默塞特陶頓时，她的父亲John De Beauchamp33岁，母亲Joan Bridport23岁。她于1372年与John de Milbourne II在英国英格兰薩默塞特利勒達结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1381年在英国賀福爾提林頓享年26岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Beauchamp
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Antoine, Jacques, Yves, Andre, Armand, Emile, Fernand, Marcel, Marthe, Remi, Alcide, Camille.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of several places in France, for example in Manche and Somme, that are named with Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + champ(s) ‘field, plain’ (from Latin bello campo ‘beautiful field’). In English the surname is generally pronounced Beecham . Compare Bushaw .
English: in some cases, an Anglo-Norman French adaptation of Scottish Campbell , by translation into French of the folk etymology de campo bello ‘from the fair field’.

variants.name: Beecham
meanings: English (Lincolnshire): variant of   Beauchamp  , reflecting the normal English pronunciation.

variants.name: Beachem
meanings: English (Somerset and Gloucestershire): variant of   Beauchamp  .

variants.name: Beachum
meanings: Altered form of English   Beauchamp  .

variants.name: Bagent
meanings: English:
possibly a colloquial pronunciation of Beauchamp or Beecham . Old French Beau- often appears as Be(e)- in English surnames. The -ch- has been voiced and excrescent -t has been added.

perhaps an Anglicized form of a French or Flemish surname such as Beaujean and Bejean, from Old French bel Jehan ‘handsome John’ + excrescent -t. It could have been introduced to England in the 15th or 16th century by Flemish migrants.

variants.name: Beacham
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Beauchamp  .

variants.name: Campbell
meanings: Scottish: nickname from Gaelic cam ‘crooked, bent’ + beul ‘mouth’. As a result of folk etymology, the surname was often represented in Latin documents as de bello campo ‘of the fair field’, which led to the name sometimes being ‘translated’ into Anglo-Norman French as Beauchamp .
Irish (North Armagh): adopted for Gaelic Mac Cathmhaoil ‘son of Cathmhaol’ (literally ‘battle chief’): see Caulfield and Cowell .
English: variant of   Camel  , under the influence of the Scottish name (see 1 above).

variants.name: Bushaw
meanings: Americanized form of French   Beauchamp   and   Bouchard  .

variants.name: Beacom
meanings: English (Somerset) and Irish (Fermanagh): of Norman origin, a variant of   Beauchamp  .

nameMeanings.name: Isolt
meanings: From the Welsh name Esyllt

variants.name: Isolde
meanings: The name of the tragic mistress of Tristan in the Arthurian romances. There are several versions of the story. The main features are that the beautiful Isolde, an Irish princess, is betrothed to the aged King Mark of Cornwall. However, through accidentally drinking a magic potion, she and the young Cornish knight Tristan fall in love, with tragic consequences. The story has exercised a powerful hold on the European imagination. The name was relatively common in Britain in the Middle Ages, but is much rarer today.

variants.name: Iseulte
meanings: From the Welsh name Esyllt

variants.name: Isolda
meanings: The name of the tragic mistress of Tristan in the Arthurian romances. There are several versions of the story. The main features are that the beautiful Isolde, an Irish princess, is betrothed to the aged King Mark of Cornwall. However, through accidentally drinking a magic potion, she and the young Cornish knight Tristan fall in love, with tragic consequences. The story has exercised a powerful hold on the European imagination. The name was relatively common in Britain in the Middle Ages, but is much rarer today.

en.lifeSummary: When Isolt De Beauchamp was born about 1356, in Taunton, Somerset, England, her father, John De Beauchamp, was 33 and her mother, Joan Bridport, was 23. She married John de Milbourne II in 1372, in Lillesdon, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1381, in Tillington, Herefordshire, England, at the age of 26.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isolt De Beauchamp est née environ 1356, à Taunton, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, John De Beauchamp, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Joan Bridport, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé John de Milbourne II en 1372, à Lillesdon, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1381, à Tillington, Herefordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 26 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isolt De Beauchamp um 1356 in Taunton, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John De Beauchamp 33 und ihre Mutter Joan Bridport 23. Sie hat 1372 in Lillesdon, Somerset, England, United Kingdom John de Milbourne II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1381 im Alter von 26 Jahren in Tillington, Herefordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isolt De Beauchamp è nata il circa 1356 nel Taunton, Somerset, England, sua padre, John De Beauchamp, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Joan Bridport, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato John de Milbourne II nel 1372, nel Lillesdon, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1381, nel Tillington, Herefordshire, England, all'età di 26 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isolt De Beauchampが約1356年にイギリスソメルセトタウントンで生まれた時，父John De Beauchampは33歳，母Joan Bridportは23歳であった。1372年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトリレスドンでJohn de Milbourne IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1381年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアティリントンで26歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isolt De Beauchamp(이)가 대략 1356년 영국 서머세트 타운턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John De Beauchamp(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Bridport(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1372년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 릴레즈던에서 John de Milbourne II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1381년 영국 허퍼드실르 틸링턴에서 26세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isolt De Beauchamp nasceu aproximadamente 1356, em Taunton, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, John De Beauchamp, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Joan Bridport, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com John de Milbourne II em 1372, em Lillesdon, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1381, em Tillington, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, com 26 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isolt De Beauchamp родилась около 1356 г. в местности таунтон, сомирсет, Англия, её отцу по имени John De Beauchamp было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Bridport, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Milbourne II в 1372 г. в местности лиллесдон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1381 г. в местности тиллингтон, хирефордшир, Англия в возрасте 26 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isolt De Beauchamp nació aproximadamente 1356, en Taunton, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, John De Beauchamp, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Joan Bridport, tenía 23 años. Se casó con John de Milbourne II en 1372, en Lillesdon, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1381, en Tillington, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 26 años.
